message:
feat(showcase): enhance WASM runner with gesture physics and motion-aware demo

Major upgrade to the interactive showcase with physically-grounded gesture
handling and a richer HTML demo:

Runner core (runner_core.rs, +354 lines):
- Implement gesture timeline rollback on cancel to restore pre-gesture
  state cleanly
- Add live-reflow deduplication via signature hashing to avoid redundant
  relayout during rapid pointer movement
- Introduce adaptive magnetic field radius that grows/shrinks based on
  gesture velocity and proximity to dock zones
- Add dynamic live-reflow thresholds that adjust based on frame budget
  pressure
- Implement preview-switch hysteresis with advantage thresholds to
  prevent flickering between nearby dock targets
- Add ghost-rect blending that combines pressure and dock-strength
  signals for opacity/scale interpolation
- Add arm_gesture/rollback helpers and allow_preview_switch() with
  configurable advantage thresholds
- Track dock_strength_bps and motion_speed_cps in PanePreviewState
- 2 unit tests for threshold dynamics

WASM bindings (wasm.rs, +29 lines):
- Expose dock_strength_bps, motion_speed_cps, and active_pointer_id
  to JavaScript via JsValue bindings

HTML demo (frankentui_showcase_demo.html, +346 lines):
- Replace mouse events with PointerEvent API (mouse fallback retained)
- Add ghost preview with zone-colored accents, strength-based opacity,
  CSS glow, scale transitions, and 150ms fade-out decay animation
- Add dock-hint HUD pill showing current dock zone and strength
- Integrate pointer capture acquire/release for reliable drag tracking
- Display dock_strength_bps and motion_speed_cps in status bar
- Skip workspace persistence during active gestures to avoid stale saves

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
